memoryArtifacts.headline: The Tremayne Story up to Thomas Tremayne 1481-1563
memoryArtifacts.description:
Dates	John de Tremaen married Margery Antron
	John’s son Peter/Perys, married Elinor Canterbury, by whom he had John de Tremaen, and then he married Nicola de Reskywes, by whom he had Peter de Tremaen …

zh.Lamerton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Tremayne於1400年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Nicholas Tremayne32歲，母親Joan Dodscombe25歲。他於大約1415年與Lady Elizabeth Carew在英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年2月1日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Tremayne于1400年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Nicholas Tremayne32岁，母亲Joan Dodscombe25岁。他于大约1415年与Lady Elizabeth Carew在英国英格兰戴文拉梅頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年2月1日在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文拉梅頓。

nameMeanings.name: Tremayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tremaine
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from one or more places in Cornwall named Tremayne (Saint Columb Major, Crowan, Saint Martin in Meneage), Tremaine, or Tremain (Pelynt). The placenames all derive from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + men ‘stone’, with the exception of Tremaine, which may have menegh, plural of manach ‘monk’, as the final element.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Tremayne was born in 1400, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Tremayne, was 32 and his mother, Joan Dodscombe, was 25. He married Lady Elizabeth Carew about 1415, in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 1 February 1483, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Tremayne est né en 1400, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Tremayne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Dodscombe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Carew environ 1415, à Lamerton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 1 février 1483, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Lamerton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Colaton Raleigh, Devon, England, United: Colaton Raleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Tremayne 1400 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Tremayne 32 und seine Mutter Joan Dodscombe 25. Er hat um 1415 in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Carew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Februar 1483 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Tremayne è nato il nel 1400 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Tremayne, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Dodscombe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Carew circa 1415, nel Lamerton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1483, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Lamerton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Tremayneが1400年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Tremayneは32歳，母Joan Dodscombeは25歳であった。約1415年にイギリスイギリスデボンラムルトンでLady Elizabeth Carewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年2月1日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンラムルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Tremayne(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Tremayne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Dodscombe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 램르턴에서 Lady Elizabeth Carew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 2월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 램르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Tremayne nasceu em 1400, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Tremayne, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Dodscombe, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Carew aproximadamente 1415, em Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1483, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Colaton Raleigh, Devon, England, United: Colaton Raleigh, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Tremayne родился в 1400 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Tremayne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Dodscombe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Carew около 1415 г. в местности лэмиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 1 февраля 1483 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности лэмиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Carew aproximadamente 1415, en Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1483, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
